description: Stable public interfaces for the agent loop: runner API, storage abstractions, tool execution, hook system, and extension seams. Implementations live in Infrastructure/.

files.responsibility: Primary public API for the agent runner — start, continue, steer, followUp, cancel, answerHuman.
Run state persistence — get by ID, optimistic concurrency via compareAndSwap.
Event sourcing store — append single/many events, load all events for a run.
Pending command queue — enqueue, markApplied, markRejected.
Outbox pattern store — enqueue events to sinks, claim, markProcessed, markFailed with retry.
Artifact storage — put named artifacts with metadata for a run.
Hot prompt state persistence — get, save, delete keyed by runId.

subNamespaces.description: Hook interfaces for intercepting agent loop lifecycle: context transforms, LLM conversion, tool call boundaries, cancellation tokens, message providers.
Extension seam interfaces — command handlers, event subscribers, hook subscribers for third-party integrations.
Tool execution contracts — platform invocation, model resolution, tool catalog, tool executor.
